# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "1.0"
services:
- name: myservice
  url: http://mywebservice.com
  plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins: '*'
      methods: 'GET,POST,PUT,PATCH,DELETE,OPTIONS'
      headers: 'Content-Type,Authorization,Accept'
  - name: auth
    config:
      anonymous: "0"
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 1000
- name: myotherservice
  url: http://myotherwebservice.com
  plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins: '*'
      methods: 'GET,POST,PUT,PATCH,DELETE,OPTIONS'
      headers: 'Content-Type,Authorization,Accept'
  - name: auth
    config:
      anonymous: "0"
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 2000
routes:
- name: myroute
  protocols:
  - http
  service: myservice
  paths:
  - /my/path
  plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins: '*'
      methods: 'GET,POST,PUT,PATCH,DELETE,OPTIONS'
      headers: 'Content-Type,Authorization,Accept'
  - name: auth
    config:
      anonymous: "0"
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 3000
